CE1.justification: Wrote the entry without prompting the user for clarification or asking them to reload any context.

CE2.justification: User-facing reply is one tight sentence naming the file, framing, and the watch-for follow-up — no preamble or restated prompt.

CE3.justification: States in one clause where it went (observations.md, 2026-05-17 entry) and why the framing fits there rather than a daybook entry.

CE4.justification: One clean append; an interrupted user would inherit a single dated entry with no half-written sibling artifacts.
